title: DeepAgentsJS steering eval suite
goal: Create a steering-specific eval suite with LangSmith experiment reporting.
constraints: Report experiment data to steer-evals-{env} project names.
Separate steering metrics from baseline harness metrics.
definition_of_done: Suite executes through existing eval harness interface.
Core and migration datasets include representative cases.
At least one test asserts steering-specific behavior metrics.
rollback_note: If eval suite is unstable, disable new suite in required CI checks and keep it in nightly mode until stabilized.
